zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，维持温和上行格局
zh.content:
当前以太坊报价1777.47美元，价格稳居SMA20均线1767.88上方，说明短期多头仍占据一定优势。虽然24小时跌幅仅0.20%，但整体波动有限，市场仍处于高位整理阶段，趋势保持偏强震荡特征。

技术指标方面，MACD数值为3.466，维持正值，表明上涨动能尚未完全衰减，不过由于Signal及RSI数据暂缺，难以进一步确认动能强弱。因此需重点观察后续成交量与价格配合，警惕短线冲高后的回落风险。

从关键价位来看，1775.70美元附近可视为短线第一支撑，若失守则关注1768美元均线区域；上方1783美元为近期直接阻力，若有效突破并站稳，则有望进一步挑战1790至1800美元整数关口，打开新的上涨空间。

交易策略建议以顺势操作为主，激进交易者可等待突破1783美元后跟进多单，稳健者则关注回踩1768至1775美元区域的企稳信号。若价格跌破均线并持续走弱，应控制仓位，耐心等待新的趋势确认后再择机入场。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading around 1777.47, holding slightly above its 20-period simple moving average at 1767.88, which points to a modest short-term bullish bias despite the muted 24-hour decline of 0.20%. Price action has remained confined within a narrow daily range between 1775.73 and 1783.09, suggesting consolidation rather than decisive directional momentum. As long as buyers continue defending levels above the moving average, the broader near-term structure remains constructive, although conviction is still limited.

Momentum indicators present a mixed picture. The available MACD reading of 3.466 indicates positive momentum remains in place, implying buyers still retain a slight advantage even if upward acceleration has moderated. However, the absence of a signal line prevents confirmation of a reliable crossover, while the unavailable RSI removes an additional measure of overbought or oversold conditions. Consequently, traders should treat the current momentum as cautiously positive rather than strongly bullish until further confirmation emerges.

Immediate support is developing near the session low around 1775.73, with stronger technical support clustered closer to the 20-day moving average near 1768. A sustained break beneath these areas could expose a deeper pullback toward the mid-1750s. On the upside, resistance is first located around the recent high of 1783.09, followed by the psychologically significant 1800 region. A decisive close above resistance would strengthen the probability of renewed upside continuation and attract additional buying interest.

From a trading perspective, patience appears appropriate while price remains inside its current consolidation range. Momentum-oriented traders may look for confirmed breakouts above resistance before initiating fresh long positions, ideally accompanied by expanding volume and stronger indicator confirmation. More conservative participants could monitor pullbacks toward support for favorable risk-to-reward entries, while placing disciplined stop-loss orders below key technical levels. Until volatility expands, maintaining prudent position sizing and avoiding aggressive leverage may provide the best balance between opportunity and risk.
